title: Fit test - All screens are properly translated to different languages
scenario: Verify all Fit Test flow screens are properly translated when phone language is changed, covering both successful and failed fit test scenarios across Tutorial and Fit Test screens.
steps: Change the phone language to a supported language (e.g., Spanish, French, German).
Open the app and navigate to the Fit Test flow.
Complete a successful Fit Test scenario, observing all screens (Tutorial and Fit Test screens) for proper translation.
Complete a failed Fit Test scenario, observing all screens (Tutorial and Fit Test screens) for proper translation.
Repeat steps 1-4 for each supported language.
expected: All text on every screen during both successful and failed Fit Test scenarios (including Tutorial and Fit Test screens) is fully and accurately translated into the selected language.
